narrative:
Washington Twp township has 804 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
